data.body: Fix committed on giverm/OSCER-681-placeholder-exemption-type (81c0b3bd). TDD: red run showed determination_data "placeholder" vs the form's real type; green after. accept_exemption_request now takes (user, application_form) like its accept_activity_report sibling and records application_form.exemption_type; controller passes @task.application_form. Updated 5 spec call sites. Full suite green (2250 ex, 0 failures), RuboCop clean. Branched off main (not stacked on #680). Not yet pushed / no PR — awaiting authorization.
